description_long: This object consists of four standard-sized aluminum beverage cans, each featuring distinct branding and color schemes. The cans are arranged side by side, with visible logos and designs for Pepsi, Sprite, Coke, and Mountain Dew. Each can is cylindrical with a slightly domed top and bottom, and a pull-tab opening mechanism on the top. The exterior surfaces are glossy and display vibrant colors: blue for Pepsi, green for Sprite, red for Coke, and green for Mountain Dew, with each can featuring its respective brand's logo and decorative graphics. Nutritional labeling and ingredient information are visible on the sides and backs of the cans. The cans appear unopened and are likely filled with carbonated soft drinks.
description: A group of four unopened, glossy aluminum soda cans featuring Pepsi, Sprite, Coke, and Mountain Dew branding, each with vibrant colors and detailed logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main logos and branding of all four cans: Pepsi (blue), Sprite (green), Coke (red), and Mountain Dew (green).
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the nutritional labeling and ingredient information on the backs of the cans, with the Mountain Dew can most prominent.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the side and partial back of each can, with branding still visible but less prominent than in the front view.
description_view_3: Opposite end view with the tops of the cans and the Pepsi can's back most visible, showing less branding and more of the can's metallic surface.
attribute_brand_logo: Visible brand logos include: Pepsi (blue, red, and white circular logo on blue can), Sprite (green, yellow, and white logo with bubbles on green can), Coke (white script on red can), and Mountain Dew (red and white text on green can). All logos are located on the front of each can.
attribute_flavor_indication: Each can features brand-specific graphics and colors that suggest the standard flavors: Pepsi (cola), Sprite (lemon-lime), Coke (cola), Mountain Dew (citrus).
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the sides and backs of the cans, including standard nutrition facts panels.
